title: Musk fires starting gun on record SpaceX IPO with rocket firm tipped for a $1.75trn valuation
description: Reports suggest that the company, now merged with Musk's artificial intelligence (AI) start-up xAI, could be valued at more than $1.75trn.
content:
Elon Musk’s rocket firm SpaceX has confidentially filed for what could become the biggest stock market listing ever.

title: AI giant Anthropic says it is 'exploring' Australia data center investments
description: Artificial intelligence giant Anthropic is eyeing data center investments in Australia, saying Wednesday the nation was a "natural partner" for work in the booming sector. With immense renewable energy potential and vast stretches of uninhabited land, Australia has touted itself as a prime location for the power-hungry data centers needed…

title: Pro-AI Super PACs Spend Millions on Texas House Races
description: At least seven Texas candidates running for Congress this year have collectively received more than $2.8 million in support from super PACs linked to artificial intelligence, according to Federal Election Commission filings, the Texas Tribune reports.
content: At least seven Texas candidates running for Congress this year have collectively received more than $2.8 million in support from super PACs linked to artificial intelligence, according to Federal Election Commission filings, the Texas Tribune reporte... [2814 chars]

title: TransUnion Completes Acquisition of the Mobile Division of RealNetworks
description: CHICAGO, April 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- TransUnion (NYSE:TRU) has successfully completed its previously announced acquisition of the mobile division of RealNetworks. This acquisition is expected to augment TransUnion’s communications solutions capabilities with advanced telecom technology that uses artificial intelligence to reduce fraud and enhance customer engagement via real-time text, multi-media messages and phone calls analysis.

description: A new report is raising concerns about how artificial intelligence could reshape the American workforce, and this time.
content:
A new report is raising concerns about how artificial intelligence could reshape the American workforce, and this time, the impact may be most severe in white-collar professions.

title: Shuo Shen: When AI Learns to Listen - The Next Decade of Sound Design
description: As artificial intelligence becomes capable of generating technically “correct” sound, the role of sound designers is undergoing a quiet but significant transformation. For sound designer Shuo Shen, this shift is not an abstract technological discussion but a reality she has encountered across film, broadcast, gaming, and emerging media productions. From the official documentary The Ceremony of the Beijing Winter Olympics to major broadcast productions such as Chinese Idol: Our Song, and from brand sonic identity systems to experimental AI-generated films, Shen’s work consistently situates sound at the center of evolving audiovisual practice. Across these diverse environments, collaborators increasingly rely on

title: US Seeks Proposals for Global Expansion of AI Systems
description: The US is calling for proposals to assist American companies in bundling and exporting comprehensive AI systems to international markets. This initiative, highlighted by Axios, aims to enhance US exports in the rapidly growing field of artificial intelligence, demonstrating a strong national push towards global technological leadership.
content: In an interesting turn of events this April, the United States has opened a call for proposals from various sectors to help American companies package and export complete artificial intelligence systems to global markets. Axios reports on this strate... [761 chars]
